sections.content:
I would like to pursue the Design Leadership and Entrepreneurship track (DLE) since the model of graduates as defined in the study guide website, is the one that resonates most with me. Interestingly enough, the related electives did originally not appeal to me, but the description of the person related to this track does suit me rather well, this model as described here, is very often the role that I take in any university or personal projects, and I identify with. The connector role, and my motivation behind projects, as described in my Professional identity relates to this as well.

"Industrial designers that develop a start-up; based on a product or a service or aim at implementing a design vision within companies and organizations, they need to take the lead to implement their vision"

This track might allow me to fill that role with even better knowledge and skills, thereby allowing the role that I like most, to be executed more smoothly and efficiently, and perhaps even pleasantly. This will also create a useful skillset for ventures after my master's.
